description: Style Note catwalk takes the sandal trend a notch higher with this pair. Wear this lovely versatile pair with harem pants, denims or leggings and look perfect. This pair is designed to Fit your foot snugly without making it seem bulky. Grab them before its too late! Product Details Red sandal with straps criss-crossing over the forefoot region and a cup for the back heel Criss crossing elasticated midfoot straps A padded and curved footbed TPU outsole with a floral lug at the heel and branded grooves at the forefoot Material and Care Synthetic, fabric Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
